cachedChangelog:
## CLI 0.1.46
- Added skill autocomplete support in slash command selector
- Improved subagent UI rendering and interaction experience
- Fixed long content being truncated in code blocks and Bash output

## CLI 0.1.45
- Bug fixes and stability improvements

## CLI 0.1.43
- Implemented permission request queuing and sequential display for concurrent subagents
- Fixed startup blocking caused by slow network responses
- Fixed CLI crash when config file is corrupted

## CLI 0.1.42
- Bug fixes and stability improvements

## CLI 0.1.41
- Fixed queued message submission clearing content being edited in input area
- Bug fixes and stability improvements

## CLI 0.1.39
- Improved login session stability in multi-process scenarios
- Bug fixes and stability improvements

## CLI 0.1.38
- Added TranscriptPath field to all hook inputs for accessing conversation transcript
- Fixed subagent Model configuration not being applied
- Fixed subagent not inheriting MCP tools from parent agent
- Improved error detection for input too long scenarios
- Fixed concurrent writes to config file causing file corruption

## CLI 0.1.37
- Added real-time streaming output for Bash tool in TUI
- Added prompt suggestion with skill creation guidance
- Redesigned /feedback command with email input step
- Fixed custom model configuration being lost after switching models
- Fixed Windows Bash streaming output and crash issues
